backend_routes.note: single ServeHTTP entry point with 3 regex routes + 1 POST endpoint; no /routes/ or /handlers/ directory

services.note: internal packages act as service-layer modules; no /services/ directory naming convention

data_models.note: ImageOptions + interface contracts only; no persistence models — primary store is opaque S3 objects

auth_files.note: no auth at proxy layer; relies on load balancer / CDN

background_jobs.note: bulk pre-resize triggered via POST /_/worker/trigger; no queue, no scheduler

persistence.note: S3 only — no relational DB, no ORM

config_files.note: no application config file; runtime config is env-var only
